name: PsyDAO
tagline: Funding psychedelic medicine research via decentralized governance
description: DAO that funds research into psychedelic-assisted therapies for mental health conditions including depression, PTSD, anxiety, and grief. IP-NFT model lets token holders vote on which trials to fund.

name: VitaDAO
tagline: Decentralized funding for longevity and healthspan research
description: One of the largest DeSci DAOs. Funds longevity research through IP-NFTs, covering aging, neurodegeneration, mental health, and metabolic disease. Has funded 20+ research projects.

name: Molecule
tagline: The protocol powering DeSci — IP-NFTs for biomedical research
description: The infrastructure layer for DeSci. Molecule's IP-NFT framework lets researchers tokenize their IP and raise funding from DAOs and individuals. Many mental health and biotech projects use Molecule.

name: ResearchHub
tagline: GitHub for science — open peer review with token rewards
description: Platform where scientists publish, review, and discuss research and earn ResearchCoin (RSC) for contributions. Covers all fields including psychology, neuroscience, and mental health.

name: LabDAO
tagline: Open, tokenized infrastructure for biological research
description: DAO building shared laboratory infrastructure and compute for life sciences. Enables researchers worldwide to access wet lab and computational tools without institutional barriers.

name: AthenaDAO
tagline: Decentralized funding for women's health research
description: DAO focused on funding research into women's health — including reproductive health, hormonal conditions, postpartum depression, and mental health issues disproportionately affecting women.

name: CryoDAO
description: DAO funding scientific research into cryopreservation, revival technologies, and preservation of biological tissue. Relevant to grief and loss — exploring continuity of life beyond death.

name: HairDAO
tagline: Decentralized funding for hair loss research
description: DAO funding alopecia and hair loss research. Hair loss has significant mental health and self-esteem impact — the DAO addresses both the biological and psychological dimensions.

name: ValleyDAO
tagline: Funding synthetic biology for planetary and human health
description: DAO funding synthetic biology research — including microbiome engineering, which has growing evidence for mental health benefits through the gut-brain axis.

name: PoSciDonDAO
tagline: Patient-driven funding for personalized medicine research
description: DAO where patients fund and govern research into their own conditions. Covers chronic illness, mental health, and rare diseases — giving patients direct power over research direction.

name: GenomicsDAO
tagline: Patient-owned genomics for personalized health insights
description: DAO where individuals own and control their genomic data, contributing to research on genetic factors in mental health, depression susceptibility, and treatment response.

name: DeSci World
tagline: The directory and community hub for all DeSci projects
description: Not a funder but the central hub for the DeSci ecosystem — lists projects, hosts events, publishes research news, and connects scientists with DAOs. Good entry point for anyone new to DeSci.

name: Opscientia
tagline: Open science infrastructure for decentralized research
description: Building open-source tools for scientific collaboration, data sharing, and reproducibility — including for neuroscience and mental health research.

name: Bio.xyz
tagline: The launchpad for biotech DAOs and DeSci projects
description: Platform for launching and funding biotech DAOs. Parent ecosystem to many DeSci projects. Provides infrastructure for tokenizing research IP and coordinating scientific communities.

name: NeurodegenerationDAO
description: DAO focusing on Alzheimer's, Parkinson's and related neurodegenerative diseases — which are deeply connected to depression, grief responses in caregivers, and cognitive mental health.

name: GreenPill Network
tagline: Regenerative crypto communities funding public goods
description: Network of local and global chapters using crypto-coordination to fund public goods including mental health access, community wellbeing, and social connection initiatives.
